## Checklist

- [ ] All existing tests pass (`uv run pytest`)
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] `docs/reference.md` updated (if API or config format changed)
- [ ] `README.md` updated (if user-facing features changed)

- [ ] Linter passes (`uv run ruff check app tests`)
- [ ] PR is focused on one logical change (no unrelated fixes bundled in)
